derived.causal_summary: Sub-phase 001 of the Search Intelligence Stress-Test Playbook. Ships the design fixture for the playbook: 9 scenarios (S1-S3 Search, Q1-Q3 Query, I1-I3 Intelligence), each with prompt + expected outcome + target tools + success indicators + cross-reference to sibling defects packet 005 where applicable. The 5-dim 0-2 scoring rubric (correctness, tool selection, latency, token efficiency, hallucination) plus narrative dim balances measurability with inter-rater reliability. The per-CLI dispatch matrix codifies invocation contracts: cli-codex (gpt-5.5 medium fast read-only), cli-copilot (gpt-5.4 high allow-all-tools, max 3 concurrent), cli-opencode (opencode-go/deepseek-v4-pro high agent=general format=json with full Spec Kit Memory MCP access; ablation cell uses agent=context for fairness). The output schema captures per-run prompt + output + meta.json + score.md, plus aggregate findings.md, with reproducibility via meta.json (latency, tokens, model, exit_code, db_snapshot_hash). Scoring methodology specifies single-scorer-per-cell for v1.0.0 with second-reviewer escalation for ≤4/10 outliers and tie-breaker rules.
